title: The Invoice Bot
hook: I charge $2,500 for something that takes me 3 hours to build.
voiceoverScript: I charge twenty five hundred dollars for something that takes me three hours to build. A client came to me spending ten hours a week creating invoices manually. I built a Claude-powered bot that reads their project data, generates invoices, and sends them automatically. Three hours of my time. Twenty five hundred dollars. And the client saves ten hours every single week. The math is simple. They were paying someone fifteen hundred a month to do invoicing. Now it costs zero. Would you try this? Comment invoice and I'll DM you the breakdown.

scenes.label: AI Invoice Generator
scenes.text: Client spent 10hrs/week on manual invoicing. Built a Claude bot to handle it all.

scenes.label: My Fee vs Their Savings
scenes.text: I charged $2,500 once. They save $1,500 every month. Forever.
